name: Royal Loan
description_short: Family-owned San Diego pawnbroker since 1992 offering immediate cash for watches, jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles through pawn, buy, or sell transactions.
description_long:
Royal Loan is a family-owned and operated pawn shop located in San Diego, California, established in 1992 by Ken Bartel. The business has been operated by the Bartel family for nearly 25 years, with Ken and his son Ethan now running daily operations as second and third-generation pawnbrokers. The company emphasizes personal customer service and individual treatment, positioning itself as an alternative to larger corporate pawn chains.

Royal Loan offers three primary transaction types: pawning items for immediate cash, buying items outright, and selling pre-owned merchandise. Their inventory spans watches (including luxury items like Rolex), gold and silver, televisions, stereos, digital cameras, tools, musical instruments, DVDs, and other merchandise. They advertise cash payouts starting at $5 and maintain an online inventory platform called their "Online Armory." The company operates Monday through Friday 10AM-6PM and Saturday 10AM-5PM.

The business distinguishes itself through family ownership and specialized expertise. Ethan Bartel holds certification from the Gemological Institute of America (GIA) in gemology and is a certified Glock armorer, indicating specialized knowledge in jewelry valuation and firearms. Ken brings over 20 years of industry experience. The company emphasizes personalized service and maintaining long-term customer relationships as core business values, contrasting with larger impersonal pawn operations.

As a pawn shop, Royal Loan's primary function is short-term collateral-based lending and merchandise resale rather than consumer credit services. Customers should understand that pawning items means surrendering possession as collateral, and failure to repay results in item forfeiture and sale. The business model serves individuals needing immediate cash but may have limited appeal for those seeking credit building or long-term financial solutions.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned and operated since 1992 with multi-generational pawnbroker expertise
Staff includes GIA-certified gemologist (Ethan Bartel) for accurate jewelry valuation
Wide variety of merchandise categories accepted including luxury watches and collectibles
Immediate cash available with no credit checks required
Three transaction options (pawn, buy, sell) providing flexibility
Local San Diego presence with established 25-year track record
Online inventory platform ("Online Armory") for remote browsing
cons: Limited operating hours (M-F 10AM-6PM, Sat 10AM-5PM only) restrict accessibility
Single physical location restricts service to San Diego area customers only
Pawning results in loss of item possession until loan repayment, carrying repossession risk
No published interest rates or loan terms disclosed on website
Lack of transparency about fees, payment plans, or loan duration options
best_for: San Diego residents needing immediate small cash loans against personal possessions
Individuals selling used watches, jewelry, electronics, or collectibles for quick payment
People with no credit history or poor credit seeking cash without credit evaluation
Collectors and enthusiasts buying pre-owned luxury items or specialty merchandise
diagnosis: Royal Loan is best for San Diego-area consumers who need immediate cash and own valuable items (jewelry, watches, electronics, tools) they're willing to pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawning means surrendering possession of your item until full repayment, and unpaid loans result in permanent loss of the item—this is a short-term cash solution, not credit building, and carries significant risk for defaulters.
services: Pawn loans against personal merchandise as collateral
Purchase of used jewelry, watches, and precious metals
Purchase of electronics including televisions, stereos, and digital cameras
Sales of pre-owned merchandise from inventory
Online inventory browsing through Online Armory platform
Firearm-related services (implied through certified Glock armorer staff)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3033 El Cajon Blvd, San Diego, CA 92104
